messages.name: exist-network
messages.text: Unable to connect to eXistDB. Please check URLs and your network.

messages.name: exist-fetch
messages.text: Error occurred while fetching files from the collection.

messages.name: exist-auth
messages.text: Authentication failed for eXistDB. Please check your credentials.

messages.name: exist-query
messages.text: Error executing query on eXistDB. Please check your query syntax and database state.

messages.name: exist-save
messages.text: Error occurred while saving document to eXistDB. Please check your data and database state.

messages.name: exist-load
messages.text: Error occurred during loading to eXistDB. Please check your connection and try again.

messages.name: exist-list
messages.text: Error occurred while fetching the file list from the collection.

messages.name: smart-align
messages.text: Error occurred during smart align. Please check your data and try again.

messages.name: invalid-xml
messages.text: Invalid XML format. Please check your document.

messages.name: no-text-to-align
messages.text: One or both documents have no text elements to align.

messages.name: exist-sync-success
messages.text: Document loaded correctly from eXistDB.

messages.name: exist-query-success
messages.text: Query executed successfully on eXistDB.

messages.name: exist-auth-success
messages.text: Successfully authenticated with eXistDB.

messages.name: exist-connection-success
messages.text: Successfully connected to eXistDB.

messages.name: exist-disconnection-success
messages.text: Successfully disconnected from eXistDB.

messages.name: exist-save-success
messages.text: Document saved correctly to eXistDB.

messages.name: smart-align-completed
messages.text: Successfully completed smart align.

messages.name: exist-sync-start
messages.text: Starting synchronization with eXistDB...

messages.name: exist-query-start
messages.text: Executing query on eXistDB...

messages.name: exist-auth-start
messages.text: Authenticating with eXistDB...

messages.name: exist-connection-start
messages.text: Connecting to eXistDB...

messages.name: exist-disconnection-start
messages.text: Disconnecting from eXistDB...

messages.name: smart-align-start

messages.name: smart-align-model-loaded
messages.text: Model loaded! Extracting text elements...

messages.name: smart-align-aligning

messages.name: smart-align-computing-embeddings
messages.text: Computing sentence embeddings...

messages.name: smart-align-find
messages.text: Finding best alignments...

messages.name: exist-deprecated
messages.text: You are using a deprecated version of eXistDB. Please consider upgrading.

messages.name: exist-slow-response
messages.text: eXistDB is responding slowly. This may indicate performance issues.

messages.name: exist-unstable-connection
messages.text: Connection to eXistDB is unstable. Please check your network.
